text: Contractor  utilizes  Procore  for  project  management  documents  and  construction  financials.  Please  supply Contractor representative contact information (first & last name + email address) for all persons needing access to drawings and submittals. Additionally, we will need contact information (first & last name + email address) for your company's billing administrator. We require pay applications to be submitted via Procore. Failure to submit billings  through  the  portal  will  result  in  delayed  payment  or  rejection  of  your  billing  until  the  next  open  billing cycle. Instructional materials will be provided to you to ensure submission success. Please contact us with questions so we can walk you through the process.
